items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of copying settings from one business to another, but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms this functionality or its expected behavior. The linked use cases and prior steps do not address the specific scenario of copying settings, leading to an inconclusive result regarding the validation of this persona scenario. Without concrete evidence or API interactions to support the expected result, the validation cannot be completed.
